extension.description: Snow AI CLI with ACE Code Search - Intelligent code navigation and search powered by AI
config.terminalMode.enum.sidebar: Embedded terminal in the sidebar (xterm.js + node-pty)
config.terminalMode.enum.split: Split editor right and open a terminal in the editor area
config.startupCommand.description: Command(s) to run when terminals start. Use comma to separate multiple commands; new terminals are assigned commands in round-robin order and each terminal keeps its assigned command across restarts.
config.terminal.shellType.description: Shell for the sidebar terminal. Use 'auto' to follow VS Code's default terminal profile, or enter a shell executable path (e.g. 'C:\Program Files\Git\bin\bash.exe', 'pwsh.exe', 'cmd.exe', '/usr/bin/zsh'). Falls back to PowerShell (Windows) or $SHELL (macOS/Linux) if the path is not found.
config.terminal.proxyUrl.description: Optional proxy URL injected into Snow CLI terminals as HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY. Leave empty to fall back to VS Code's http.proxy setting.
config.terminal.fontFamily.description: Font family for the sidebar terminal. Leave empty to use the default monospace font.
config.terminal.fontSize.description: Font size (px) for the sidebar terminal.
config.terminal.fontWeight.description: Font weight for the sidebar terminal.
config.terminal.lineHeight.description: Line height for the sidebar terminal.
config.bell.enabled.description: Enable terminal bell (BEL / \x07) notifications. When disabled, both audio and visual feedback are suppressed.
config.bell.volume.description: Terminal bell volume (0.0 - 1.0). Set to 0 to mute audio while still allowing visual flash.
config.bell.sound.description: Bell sound style. Use 'none' to disable audio while keeping visual flash enabled.
config.bell.sound.enum.beep: Short 800Hz sine beep (default classic terminal bell)
config.bell.visualFlash.description: Show a brief visual flash overlay on the terminal panel when the bell rings.
config.gitBlame.enabled.description: Enable Git Blame annotations. Shows commit info (author, time, message) on the current line, similar to GitLens.
config.completion.enabled.description: Enable Snow CLI inline AI code completion. When enabled, suggestions appear automatically while typing.
config.completion.provider.description: The request scheme used to talk to the completion model.
config.completion.provider.enum.chat: OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions API (e.g. OpenAI, DeepSeek chat, OpenRouter, vLLM, Ollama)
config.completion.provider.enum.fim: OpenAI Completions API (FIM / Fill-In-the-Middle). Recommended for DeepSeek (baseUrl=https://api.deepseek.com/beta), Mistral codestral, etc. Uses raw prefix+suffix without chat prompts.
config.completion.baseUrl.description: Base URL for the completion API. Leave empty to use the provider's default endpoint.
config.completion.apiKey.description: API Key for the completion provider. Stored in VS Code settings; consider using a workspace-only or restricted environment.
config.completion.model.description: Model name used for inline completion. Use the 'Snow CLI: Select Completion Model' command to fetch the list from the API.
config.completion.maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens generated for each completion suggestion.
config.completion.temperature.descriptio: Sampling temperature for completion. Lower values produce more deterministic suggestions.
config.completion.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay (ms) before sending an automatic completion request after typing stops.
config.completion.contextPrefixLines.des: Number of lines of code before the cursor sent as context.
config.completion.contextSuffixLines.des: Number of lines of code after the cursor sent as context.
config.completion.languages.description: Language IDs where inline completion is active. Use '*' to enable for all languages.
config.completion.proxy.description: Optional HTTP/HTTPS proxy URL for completion API requests. Leave empty to use no proxy.
config.nextEdit.enabled.description: Enable Snow CLI Next Edit Prediction. After you finish editing, similar locations in this file (or workspace) are highlighted so you can Tab-jump and apply the same change.
config.nextEdit.scope.description: Search scope used to find similar edit candidates.
config.nextEdit.useLspReferences.descrip: When the edited token is a single identifier, query the language server for references first (more precise than text search). Falls back to text search if no references are returned.
config.nextEdit.maxCandidates.descriptio: Maximum number of candidate locations queued per session.
config.nextEdit.minPatternLength.descrip: Minimum length (in characters) of the changed text to trigger a prediction.
config.nextEdit.debounceMs.description: Quiet period after typing stops before predictions are computed (milliseconds).
